message:
fix: Correct negative reading frame translation and CRISPR analysis off-by-one

- Fix gene slicing logic in crispr.ts to use 0-based indices correctly
- Implement correct Reverse Complement translation for negative frames in virtualizer.ts
- Add totalLength support to grid builder for global frame alignment
- Update SequenceGrid to pass genomeLength

 {"id":"phage_explorer-xkxf","content_hash":"addb8dd516c14c14de7888e9abf850e309b4efb2162e3b915a85d2dfb83317d5","title":"Remove Cartoon 3D rendering mode","description":"","notes":"# Remove Cartoon 3D Rendering Mode

## Problem Statement

The "Cartoon" rendering mode is redundant with "Ribbon" mode and provides inferior visual results. Having two nearly-identical options confuses users and adds unnecessary UI complexity.

## Analysis

| Mode | What it renders | Visual style |
|------|-----------------|--------------|
| Ball-Stick | Atoms + bonds | Atomic detail |
| Cartoon | Backbone traces as tubes | Smooth tubes |
| Ribbon | Backbone traces as tubes | Smooth tubes |
| Surface | Solvent-accessible surface | Blob-like |

Cartoon and Ribbon both use `buildTubeFromTraces()` with nearly identical parameters:

**Cartoon (lines 169-177):**
```tsx
group = buildTubeFromTraces(
  data.backboneTraces,
  0.5,                              // radius
  qualityPreset.tubeRadialSegments,
  '#38bdf8',                        // color (sky blue)
  1,                                // opacity
  chainColors,
  qualityPreset.tubeMinSegments
);
```

**Ribbon (lines 179-188):**
```tsx
group = buildTubeFromTraces(
  data.backboneTraces,
  0.3,                              // radius (slightly thinner)
  Math.max(6, qualityPreset.tubeRadialSegments - 2),
  '#c084fc',                        // color (purple)
  0.9,                              // opacity (slightly transparent)
  chainColors,
  qualityPreset.tubeMinSegments
);
```

The only differences are:
- Tube radius (0.5 vs 0.3)
- Default color (sky blue vs purple)
- Opacity (1.0 vs 0.9)

These differences don't justify a separate mode.

## Solution

1. Remove 'cartoon' from the RenderMode type
2. Remove the Cartoon button from the UI toolbar
3. Remove the cartoon case from rebuildStructure switch
4. Optionally: Add thickness slider to Ribbon mode for users who want thicker tubes

## Files to Modify

**`/packages/web/src/components/Model3DView.tsx`:**
- Line 23: Remove 'cartoon' from RenderMode type
- Lines 169-177: Remove cartoon case
- Lines 531-543: Remove Cartoon button from toolbar

## UI Before/After

**Before:**
```
[Ball-Stick] [Cartoon] [Ribbon] [Surface]
```

**After:**
```
[Ball-Stick] [Ribbon] [Surface]
```

## Testing

- [ ] Cartoon button no longer appears
- [ ] Selecting modes still works correctly
- [ ] No TypeScript errors from removed type
- [ ] Default mode (ball) still works

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Cartoon mode completely removed from codebase
- [ ] UI shows only 3 render modes
- [ ] No console errors or warnings
- [ ] Ribbon mode remains fully functional","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:25:47.350232-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-09T11:42:44.321161-05:00","closed_at":"2025-12-09T11:42:44.321161-05:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-xkxf","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-vru3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:26:23.410837-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

 {"id":"phage_explorer-y07y","content_hash":"fcd95be8af905892325f90cbde8c5dd39e20c3f7b854abaf0574bdf01a1d8386","title":"Create ContextHelpPanel component","description":"Collapsible sidebar panel that shows relevant help based on current view/selection. Auto-detects context from: active overlay, selected gene, focused track. Shows related terms, mini-explanations, and links to full modules. Maintains scroll position during navigation.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:46:36.415627-05:00","updated_at":"2025-12-10T15:01:36.442802897-06:00","closed_at":"2025-12-10T15:01:36.442802897-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y07y","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-owsv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:46:54.038529-05:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y07y","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-3zpa","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-09T11:46:54.267011-05:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
-{"id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","content_hash":"9d5b70aeb5c40b0cb84bf614d16aae63e3a80a4cff4016d212d921d3f00f488c","title":"Feature: Mobile Touch UX Overhaul - Touch-First Redesign","description":"","status":"in_progress","priority":0,"issue_type":"feature","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:31:41.505776147-06:00","updated_at":"2025-12-12T12:32:43.967762139-06:00","source_repo":".","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","depends_on_id":"phage_explorer-vntd","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-12T12:32:16.288017368-06:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}],"comments":[{"id":14,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","author":"ubuntu","text":"# Mobile Touch UX Overhaul - Touch-First Redesign

## The Problem

The mobile experience has fundamental anti-patterns that make the app frustrating to use on touch devices:

1. **Touch targets too small** - Many interactive elements are < 44px (Apple minimum)
2. **Hover-dependent interactions** - GeneMapCanvas tooltips require mouse hover
3. **Accidental gestures** - Low swipe threshold (80px) causes unintended navigation
4. **Broken landscape mode** - Control Deck takes 50% of viewport
5. **Poor discoverability** - Control Deck appears suddenly with no affordance

## Impact

- ~60% of users on mobile/tablet (estimate based on analytics)
- High bounce rate on mobile devices
- Negative reviews citing "unusable on phone"
- Accessibility violations (WCAG 2.5.5 Target Size)

## Current State Analysis

### Touch Targets (mobile-overrides.css:61)
```css
/* Current - too small */
.btn-sm { min-height: 32px; min-width: 32px; }

/* Should be */
.btn-sm { min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px; }
```

### GeneMapCanvas (GeneMapCanvas.tsx:46-90)
- Uses `onMouseMove` for hover detection
- Tooltip positioned with `fixed` (fragile on mobile)
- No touch event handlers
- Click-to-navigate requires precise aim

### Control Deck (control-deck.css:28)
- Fixed 140px height regardless of viewport
- On iPhone SE landscape: 140/320 = 44% of viewport
- "Tools" tab opens Command Palette (confusing naming)

### Swipe Threshold (App.tsx:274-275)
- Horizontal: 80px (too low)
- Vertical tolerance: 60px (too permissive)
- Accidental swipes while scrolling list

## Solution Architecture

### 1. Touch Target Audit & Fix
Systematically ensure all interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px:
- Buttons (including badge buttons, compact mode)
- List items (entire row should be tappable)
- Gene map segments (expand hit area)
- Overlay close buttons

### 2. Touch-Friendly Gene Tooltips
Replace mouse hover with:
- Long-press to show tooltip (300ms delay)
- Tap to navigate + brief tooltip flash
- Bottom sheet for detailed info on mobile

### 3. Control Deck Improvements
- Dynamic height based on viewport (max 40% landscape, 50% portrait)
- Clear visual affordance (subtle "swipe up for more" hint)
- Rename "Tools" to something clearer
- Add drag handle for resize

### 4. Gesture Threshold Tuning
- Increase swipe threshold to 120px minimum
- Reduce vertical tolerance to 40px
- Add velocity detection (fast swipes count, slow drags don't)

### 5. Landscape Mode Fix
- Control Deck collapses to single-row in landscape
- Expand on tap to show full controls
- Or: Move to side panel in landscape

## Design Guidelines

**Touch targets:**
- Minimum 44x44px visual + interactive area
- 8px minimum spacing between targets
- Use padding to expand hit area (not just visual size)

**Gestures:**
- Single-tap: primary action
- Long-press (300ms): secondary action (tooltip, context menu)
- Swipe: navigation (high threshold, velocity-aware)
- Pinch: zoom (if applicable)

**Feedback:**
- Immediate visual response on touch (< 100ms)
- Haptic feedback on iOS (if available)
- Touch ripple effect on Android-style

## Success Criteria

- [ ] All touch targets >= 44x44px
- [ ] Gene map works with touch (tap + long-press)
- [ ] Control Deck < 40% viewport in landscape
- [ ] No accidental phage changes from list scrolling
- [ ] Works on iPhone SE (smallest common device)","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:32:22Z"},{"id":27,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","author":"ubuntu","text":"Deep perf/UX fixes:
- 3D viewer: stop RAF when offscreen (IntersectionObserver) or tab hidden; fix cleanup (remove canvas, dispose highlight group, clear refs); clear stale structure refs on missing PDB / query error.
- Structure build: reduce GC by reusing vectors in bond instancing loop.
- Sequence AA HUD: compute single codon AA via translateCodon (no full translateSequence/reverseComplement), add move threshold for long-press, and clear HUD timers on unmount.
- Web prefs: persist show3DModel in localStorage so users can disable 3D and keep it off (huge mobile win).

Validated: bun web build + bun test pass.","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:50:20Z"}]}

Systematically ensure all interactive elements meet minimum 44x44px:

- Overlay close buttons

### 2. Touch-Friendly Gene Tooltips
Replace mouse hover with:
- Long-press to show tooltip (300ms delay)
- Tap to navigate + brief tooltip flash
- Bottom sheet for detailed info on mobile

### 3. Control Deck Improvements
- Dynamic height based on viewport (max 40% landscape, 50% portrait)
- Clear visual affordance (subtle "swipe up for more" hint)
- Rename "Tools" to something clearer
- Add drag handle for resize

### 4. Gesture Threshold Tuning
- Increase swipe threshold to 120px minimum
- Reduce vertical tolerance to 40px
- Add velocity detection (fast swipes count, slow drags don't)

### 5. Landscape Mode Fix
- Control Deck collapses to single-row in landscape
- Expand on tap to show full controls
- Or: Move to side panel in landscape

## Design Guidelines

**Touch targets:**
- Minimum 44x44px visual + interactive area
- 8px minimum spacing between targets
- Use padding to expand hit area (not just visual size)

**Gestures:**
- Single-tap: primary action
- Long-press (300ms): secondary action (tooltip, context menu)
- Swipe: navigation (high threshold, velocity-aware)
- Pinch: zoom (if applicable)

**Feedback:**
- Immediate visual response on touch (< 100ms)
- Haptic feedback on iOS (if available)
- Touch ripple effect on Android-style

## Success Criteria

- [ ] All touch targets >= 44x44px
- [ ] Gene map works with touch (tap + long-press)
- [ ] Control Deck < 40% viewport in landscape
- [ ] No accidental phage changes from list scrolling
- [ ] Works on iPhone SE (smallest common device)","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:32:22Z"},{"id":27,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","author":"ubuntu","text":"Deep perf/UX fixes:
- 3D viewer: stop RAF when offscreen (IntersectionObserver) or tab hidden; fix cleanup (remove canvas, dispose highlight group, clear refs); clear stale structure refs on missing PDB / query error.
- Structure build: reduce GC by reusing vectors in bond instancing loop.
- Sequence AA HUD: compute single codon AA via translateCodon (no full translateSequence/reverseComplement), add move threshold for long-press, and clear HUD timers on unmount.
- Web prefs: persist show3DModel in localStorage so users can disable 3D and keep it off (huge mobile win).

Validated: bun web build + bun test pass.","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:50:20Z"},{"id":28,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","author":"ubuntu","text":"More deep fixes:
- : prevents catastrophic OOM by using O(n) exact diff for equal-length genomes and a prefix/suffix heuristic for large unequal-length inputs; guards worker console noise behind DEV.
- : makes JSON parse warnings + unsupported setPreference warning DEV-only; fixes LIKE ESCAPE handling by escaping backslashes in search queries.
- : fixes exclusion off-by-one (), allowing back-to-back packing without artificial 1-codon gap.

Re-validated: bun web build + bun test pass.","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:59:10Z"},{"id":29,"issue_id":"phage_explorer-y5wb","author":"ubuntu","text":"Follow-up (the prior comment got mangled by shell backticks):
- packages/web/src/workers/comparison.worker.ts: prevents catastrophic OOM by using O(n) exact diff for equal-length genomes and a prefix/suffix heuristic for large unequal-length inputs; guards worker console noise behind DEV.
- packages/web/src/db/SqlJsRepository.ts: makes JSON parse warnings + unsupported setPreference warning DEV-only; fixes LIKE ESCAPE handling by escaping backslashes in search queries.
- packages/core/src/analysis/translation-simulation.ts: fixes exclusion off-by-one (< footprint), allowing back-to-back packing without an artificial 1-codon gap.

Re-validated: bun web build + bun test pass.","created_at":"2025-12-12T18:59:28Z"}]}
